message:
fix(test): skip permission-based test in sandboxed environments

The soft_delete_wal_restores_state_on_rewrite_failure test uses chmod
to make a directory read-only, which is not permitted in some sandboxed
environments.  Gracefully skip the test when set_permissions fails
instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
